data.title: Jacobs secures owner’s engineer role for wind farm project in South Australia
data.description: In Dallas, it was announced that Jacobs has been chosen as the owner's engineer for a wind farm project in Australia. This project will support the country's renewables portfolio and energy goals. This partnership showcases Jacobs' commitment to sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Baidu Announces Record Date for Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Baidu, Inc. disclosed that the record date for assessing eligibility will be set. Baidu, a prominent AI company with robust internet roots, operates under the tickers Nasdaq: BIDU, HKEX: 9888 (HKD Counter), and 89888 (RMB Counter).

data.title: Eaton Accelerates Sustainability Impact with 40% Emissions Reduction and $2.1B in R&D Investment
data.description: Eaton (NYSE: ETN), an intelligent power management company, recently released its 2025 Sustainability Report in Dublin. The report showcases the company's significant progress and increased emphasis on achieving widespread impact. In response to the growing complexity of global power management needs, Eaton is introducing innovative solutions to assist customers in enhancing efficiency, bolstering resilience, and minimizing their ecological footprint. Moreover, the company is actively working on improving transparency and accountability throughout its operations. data.title: Foodservice Paper Bag Market to Reach USD 8.9 Billion by 2036 as Takeaway Culture and Sustainable Food Packaging Accelerate Demand Across Global Foodservice Industry
data.description: In a recent report by Future Market Insights (FMI), it was revealed that the global foodservice paper bag market is witnessing significant growth. This growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of paper-based packaging solutions by various establishments such as restaurants, cafés, bakeries, and food delivery platforms. The analysis forecasts a sustained expansion phase for the market, indicating promising prospects for the industry. This shift towards paper bags is driven by environmental concerns and the rising demand for sustainable packaging options. The market research suggests that the foodservice paper bag market is set to experience continued growth in the coming years, with estimates pointing towards a substantial increase in market size. This trend underscores the importance of eco-friendly packaging solutions in the foodservice sector.

data.title: Lindsay Corporation Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: Lindsay Corporation, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure technology worldwide, disclosed its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results concluding on May 31, 2026. Notable figures include an 8% rise in infrastructure revenues, bolstered by consistent growth in road safety products. Additionally, an international irrigation project in the Middle East North Africa (MENA) region is progressing as planned. Lindsay Corporation is traded on the NYSE under the symbol LNN.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable to Host Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Brookfield Renewable announced that it will host its Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast on July 31, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the event is to review the company's performance and discuss upcoming business strategies. Brookfield Renewable is listed on the NYSE under the tickers BEP and BEPC, as well as on the TSX under BEP.UN and BEPC.

data.title: UMH PROPERTIES, INC. SECOND QUARTER 2026 OPERATIONS UPDATE
data.description: UMH Properties, Inc., a real estate investment trust focused on owning and managing manufactured home communities, has released an update on its performance in the second quarter of 2026. The company, listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol UMH and TASE under UMH, shared details about their operating results during this period.

data.title: Ring Energy Announces Debt Paydown, Reaffirmation of Borrowing Base and Enhanced Liquidity Position
data.description: An oil and gas company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Ring Energy, Inc. (NYSE American: REI), reported that they successfully reduced their debt by $66 million. The company's senior revolving credit facility, valued at $1.0 billion, has undergone an amendment and confirmed a borrowing base of $585 million post their latest semi-annual evaluation. Ring's upcoming borrowing base reassessment is set for the autumn of 2026.
Brookfield Business Corporation sets conference call for Q2 2026 earnings update.

data.title: Brookfield Infrastructure to Host Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners has announced that they will be hosting their Q2 2026 conference call and webcast on Thursday, July 30, 2026, starting at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Wallbox Completes Approximately €11.8 Million Equity Raise and Secures Additional €4 Million Investment
data.description: Barcelona, Spain, Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), a leading global provider of electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, has confirmed the completion of its financial restructuring. This includes finalizing conditions for an equity raise of around €11.8 million and a €4 million investment by FOCUS ON NEX. The achievements mark a significant step for the Company and its subsidiaries in enhancing their financial stability and growth prospects.

data.title: Data Center Heat Exchangers Market worth $14.40 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ revealed insights on the Data Center Heat Exchangers Market. The report covers various types of heat exchangers such as Air-to-Air, Liquid-to-Liquid, Liquid-to-Air, and Refrigerant-Based. Different cooling technologies, applications, and data center types including Hyperscale, Colocation, Enterprise, and Edge were also discussed. This research provides valuable information for stakeholders in the data center industry.

data.title: Hanshow Spotlights Smart Cart Ecosystem at CGF Global Summit 2026, Reimagining the In-Store Value Chain
data.description: A CGF Roundtable named "Smart Cart Revolution in Physical Retail" was organized by Hanshow, a prominent provider of digital store solutions. The event took place during the 2026 Consumer Goods Forum Global Summit in Vienna on July 2. It aimed to gather senior executives from various sectors of the retail industry to explore the impact and potential of smart shopping carts. This initiative signifies a growing interest in technological advancements within physical retail spaces and highlights the importance of adapting to changing consumer trends.

data.title: LDO price forecast: $0.24 floor weakens as $0.248 is resistance, with bearish moving averages and low volume concern.
data.description: LDO is currently trading at a price of $0.248, experiencing downward pressure from a bearish moving average stack. The thin trading volume indicates a lack of strong interest in the stock, which is barely holding support at $0.24. If the price closes below this level, it could lead to further declines.

data.title: #HBAR is showing a 6% intraday bounce but needs to surpass $0.08 to indicate a genuine reversal. Bear case remains dominant.
data.description: The cryptocurrency HBAR has experienced a significant 6% increase in value during intraday trading, despite remaining below key moving averages on the chart. In order for the token to demonstrate strength, it must surpass the $0.08 mark convincingly. Currently, the bearish scenario appears to dominate the market sentiment.

data.title: WIF faces critical resistance at $0.18, up 4.55%. Momentum flat, volume weak. Rejection could lead to $0.15 support test.
data.description: WIF has struggled to break through the $0.18 resistance, dropping 4.55%. Momentum indicators remain stagnant and volume is low. If it fails to break through, it could drop to $0.15.

data.title: PEPE's RSI drops to 28.94, signaling oversold conditions. 4.80% bounce suggests sellers are exhausted. Short-term relief rally expected amid bearish trend.
data.description: PEPE's Relative Strength Index (RSI) has dropped significantly to 28.94, indicating it is now in oversold territory. This was followed by a 4.80% intra-day increase, suggesting that sellers may be running out of steam. These indicators point towards a potential short-term relief rally ahead.
